nodes.name: 鹤形目
nodes.summary: 鹤形目（Gruiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联126种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、灰冠鹤、Grey-winged trumpeter等126种鸟类。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 格陵兰
nodes.summary: 格陵兰是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括雪雁、粉脚雁、角鸊鷉等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 亚速尔群岛
nodes.summary: 亚速尔群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括西方秧鸡、大藍鷺、Barolo shearwater等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马德拉群岛
nodes.summary: 马德拉群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括西方秧鸡、长耳鸮、Rufous-capped antthrush等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秧鸡科
nodes.summary: 秧鸡科（Rallidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Tsingy forest rail、Madagascar forest rail、Chestnut forest rail等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 湿地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括鵲鵝、澳洲硬尾鸭、黑天鹅等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 外赫布里底群岛
nodes.summary: 外赫布里底群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括西方秧鸡、中杓鹬、短尾賊鷗，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 西方秧鸡
nodes.summary: 西方秧鸡（学名：Rallus aquaticus）为秧鸡科秧鸡属的鸟类。该物种的模式产地在英格兰。 近年来研究把西方秧鸡（原普通秧鸡）分为了两个物种，其中把之前的 R.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: aquaticus }} The water rail, western water rail or European water rail (Rallus aquaticus) is a bird of the rail family which breeds in well-vegetated wetlands across Europe, Asia and North Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: hibernans, became extinct around 1965, as a result of loss of habitat through the draining of wetlands, and predation by the introduced American mink. Prior to its extinction, at least some birds were present year-round on the island, relying on warm volcanic springs to survive through the coldest months, but this race was also found in winter in the Faroe Islands and Ireland, and on passage through the Western Isles, suggesting that the Icelandic form was a partial migrant. links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: aquaticus }} The water rail, western water rail or European water rail (Rallus aquaticus) is a bird of the rail family which breeds in well-vegetated wetlands across Europe, Asia and North Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In addition to natural fresh or marine marshes, this rail may use gravel or clay excavations and peat workings as long as there is suitable habitat with good cover

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Introduced predators, such as the American mink, have caused marked declines in populations of rails and other ground-nesting birds.|thumb The water rail's numbers are declining, but it has a large population of 100,000–1,000,000 adults and a huge breeding range estimated at ; it is therefore classed as least concern on the IUCN Red List.
